FontString.name: $parent_UpdateText
FontString.text: A new version of TurtleRP is available.

Scripts.OnEnter: local faction = TurtleRP.GetAdminPendingFactionValue(TurtleRPCharacterInfo and TurtleRPCharacterInfo["faction"]) GameTooltip:SetOwner(this, "ANCHOR_RIGHT") GameTooltip:SetText(TurtleRP.getFactionDisplayName(faction)) GameTooltip:Show()

Scripts.OnClick: local r, g, b = TurtleRP.hex2rgb(TurtleRPCharacterInfo['class_color']) TurtleRP.showColorPicker(r, g, b, 1, TurtleRP.colorPickerCallback);

FontString.name: $parent_FlavourText
FontString.text: Describe your RP style for others to see.

FontString.name: $parent_FlavourText
FontString.text: What are the first things that other adventurers notice about you?

FontString.name: $parent_FlavourText
FontString.text: Give a more detailed description here, such as background and appearance.

FontString.name: $parent_FlavourText
FontString.text: Add notes to yourself about your character, interactions with other players, etc. These will not be shared.

FontString.name: $parent_Placeholder
FontString.text: Write private notes here. These are only for you.

FontString.name: $parent_AltIdentifierFlavourText
FontString.text: Add an optional Alt-Identifier in enabled channels.

FontString.name: $parent_AltIdentifierDisableIfMatchText
FontString.text: Disable if Name matches Character Name:

Scripts.OnLoad: local text = getglobal(this:GetName() .. "Text") if text then text:Show() text:SetText("Select Channel...") end
local text = getglobal(this:GetName() .. "Text") if text then text:Show() text:SetText("Select Profile...") end

FontString.name: $parent_FlavourText
FontString.text: Load one of your pets here, then edit and save its assigned profile.

Scripts.OnLoad: local text = getglobal(this:GetName() .. "Text") if text then text:Show() text:SetText("Select Pet Profile...") end

FontString.name: $parent_PVPText
FontString.text: Disable Location Sharing While PvP Flagged

Scripts.OnClick:
if TurtleRPSettings["bgs"] == "off" then TurtleRPSettings["bgs"] = "on" else TurtleRPSettings["bgs"] = "off" end
TurtleRP.pingWithLocationAndVersion("P")
if TurtleRPSettings["tray"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["tray"] = "1" TurtleRP_IconTray:Show() else TurtleRPSettings["tray"] = "0" TurtleRP_IconTray:Hide() end
if TurtleRPSettings["name_size"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["name_size"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["name_size"] = "0" end
if this:GetChecked() then TurtleRPSettings["hide_minimap_icon"] = "0" else TurtleRPSettings["hide_minimap_icon"] = "1" end TurtleRP.RefreshMinimapIconState()
if TurtleRPSettings["share_location"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["share_location"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["share_location"] = "0" end TurtleRP.pingWithLocationAndVersion("P")
if TurtleRPSettings["show_nsfw"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["show_nsfw"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["show_nsfw"] = "0" end
if TurtleRPSettings["chat_names"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["chat_names"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["chat_names"] = "0" end
if TurtleRPSettings["chat_colors"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["chat_colors"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["chat_colors"] = "0" end

if this:GetChecked() then TurtleRPSettings["disable_tooltip"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["disable_tooltip"] = "0" end if TurtleRP.RefreshAdminStateSnapshot then TurtleRP.RefreshAdminStateSnapshot() end
if TurtleRPSettings["disable_tooltip_bg"] == "0" then TurtleRPSettings["disable_tooltip_bg"] = "1" else TurtleRPSettings["disable_tooltip_bg"] = "0" end

FontString.name: $parent_AboutText
FontString.text:
Thank you for your existence. I truly hope you have an excellent day.
TurtleRP is presently maintained by Takoy (bratmage). Contact me on discord @takoy or on github.
It was originally developed by Drixi, with collaboration and help from Ashkir.
Other thanks to those who have helped over the years- OldManAlpha, Zara, Vee, and luskanek.

FontString.name: $parent_IssuesText
FontString.text:
Not seeing profiles? Make sure you are in the TTRP channel by pressing 'Rejoin / Reload' below.
Due to chat restrictions, on the Turtle WoW server players under level 10 cannot see other profiles and others cannot see theirs. Level up already!

Scripts.OnLoad:
if ShaguTweaks_config and ShaguTweaks_config["Darkened UI"] and ShaguTweaks_config["Darkened UI"] == 1 then this.Material = this.Material or this:CreateTexture(nil, "OVERLAY") this.Material:SetTexture("Interface\\Stationery\\StationeryTest1") this.Material:SetWidth(325) this.Material:SetHeight(355) this.Material:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", this, 17, -74) this.Material:SetVertexColor(.8, .8, .8) end
local found = nil for i = 1, table.getn(UISpecialFrames) do if UISpecialFrames[i] == this:GetName() then found = 1 break end end if not found then table.insert(UISpecialFrames, this:GetName()) end

Scripts.OnEnterPressed: TurtleRP.iconSelectorFilter = this:GetText() or "" TurtleRP_IconSelector_ScrollBox.offset = 0 TurtleRP.Icon_ScrollBar_Update() this:ClearFocus()
